title: Fresh Blood: 3 Stocks Ready to Rally Under New CEOs
text: In recent years, S&P 500 companies with new chief executive officers (CEOs) have become a regular occurrence. That's because CEOs are moving on more quickly — both by choice and because of activist investors — and that means there are always interesting possibilities for stocks set to rally under new CEOs.

title: Barclays Downgrades Viatris
text: Fintel reports that on June 23, 2023, Barclays downgraded their outlook for Viatris (NASDAQ:VTRS) from Equal-Weight to Underweight.

title: The Wonders of Shareholder Yield
text: Shareholder Yield is a composite metric which measures potential shareholder returns. Many investors are not terribly familiar with this metric, preferring to pay attention to dividends alone.

title: Viatris: Won't Take Much To Move The Needle
text: Viatris remains a dirt cheap stock in a frothy market and pays a well-covered dividend yield. It continues to make progress towards deleveraging, and could return substantial capital to shareholders in 2024. With market sentiment working against the stock, it could deliver potentially strong total returns for investors should the tide change.

title: These 2 Dividend Stocks Yield 5% -- and They Aren't Risky Buys
